title: Section 122
content: (1) The Chairperson may, by written notice, call upon any inhabitant of New Delhi to furnish such information as may be necessary for the purpose of ascertaining-- (a) whether such inhabitant is liable to pay any tax imposed by the Council under this Act; (b) at what amount he should be assessed; or (c) the rateable value of the land or building which he occupies and the name and address of the owner or lessee thereof. (2) If any person when called upon under sub-section (1) to furnish information neglects to furnish it within the period specified in this behalf by the Chairperson or furnishes information which is not true to the best of his knowledge or belief, he shall be liable, in addition to any penalty which may be imposed under this Act, to be assessed at such amount on account of tax as the Chairperson may deem proper, and the assessment so made shall, subject to the provisions of this Act, be final.
